summary: ANDROID | FALCON | DFU - After succesful DFU previous FW version is displayed on Home page and settings page
scenario: After a successful DFU, the firmware version displayed on the Home page and device settings page does not update until the app is restarted.
description_clean: After a successful DFU (Device Firmware Update), the previous firmware version is still displayed on the Home page and device settings page. The correct firmware version only appears after restarting the app.
steps: Perform a successful Device Firmware Update (DFU)
Navigate to the Device Settings page
Check the displayed firmware version there
Navigate to the Home page again
expected: After a successful DFU, the new firmware version should be displayed immediately on the Home page and Device Settings page without needing to restart the app.
actual: After a successful DFU, the previous firmware version is still displayed on the Home page and Device Settings page. The correct firmware version only appears after restarting the app.
